gf_body: Upload any room photo and generate stunning photorealistic interior concepts in seconds. Living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, offices — any space, any style.
f2_body: Upload any inspiration image. Our AI extracts color palettes, material signatures, and spatial mood — then applies them to your actual space.
f3_body: See the transformation in real time. Upload a bare room, add a reference image, and watch photorealistic AI interior concepts render in seconds.
f4_body: Design custom furniture pieces that perfectly match your AI interior. Wardrobes, kitchen cabinets, TV units, vanities — with blueprints and material specs.
f5_body: Generate contractor-ready construction documents. Floor plans, elevation drawings, cabinet construction details, and material schedules.
top_body: One unified AI engine. Six floors of capability. From your first photo to the final construction drawing.
